title: generate is very slow
body:
I'm having significant speed penalty in using a (large?) generate loop both for verilator and also c compile pass after.
I have a module which implements a multi-input adder tree and I need to instantiate this more than 100 times which I do in a generate loop. The problem is running it at the max number takes verilator more than 10 minutes (not actually timed but I thought it hanged so noticed it much later that it actually worked) as opposed to 20-30 seconds when the generate loop count is 1. The c compiler pass after verilator is also very slow.
Any idea how to accelerate this? compiler settings etc? I'm running -O3 for verilator and it's doing -Os on the compiler flags.

I'm afraid I don't have a test case. I can't share this code because it's proprietary. I'll try VCS next just to see what it would do.

Verilator 5.017 devel rev v5.014-145-g44e7d2ebe
